name: brave-shields-extension
description: Ad and tracker blocking powered by Brave's adblock-rust engine

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../dist/wasm && cd .. && npx ts-node --project build/tsconfig.json build/prepare-wasm-glue.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:lists && npm run build:dnr && npm run build:cosmetic && npm run build:engine && npm run build:extension
